result.stdout:
dotvvm-startup-perf:
  Measures the performance of DotVVM startup

Usage:
  dotvvm-startup-perf [options] <project>

Arguments:
  <project>    Path to the project file

Options:
  -t, --type <AspNetCore|Owin|RunDotnet> (REQUIRED)    Type of the project
  -r, --repeat <repeat>                                How many times the operation should be repeated [default: 1]
  -u, --url <url>                                      Relative URL in the app that should be tested [default: ]
  -v, --verbose                                        Diagnostics output [default: False]
  --timeout <timeout>                                  Timeout for the HTTP interface to start listening [default: 10]
  --version                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                       Show help and usage information
